title: Write ops: cell set
description: Create ops/write.py with set_cell(). Implements type inference: values starting with '=' stored as formula string; integer-parseable values stored as int; float-parseable as float; all else as str. Saves atomically by writing to a temp file in the same directory then os.replace(). Wire 'pyxlsx cell set' CLI command in cli.py.
acceptance_criteria: set_cell() writes the inferred type to the specified cell and saves atomically
Values starting with '=' are stored as formula strings
Integer strings are stored as int, float strings as float, everything else as str
pyxlsx cell set <file> <sheet> <cell> <value> writes and outputs confirmation JSON
Round-trip: cell set followed by cell get returns the written value
Atomic write uses temp file + os.replace() in the same directory

handoff_summary.completed:
- Created .apm/skills/pyxlsx/pyxlsx/ops/write.py with _infer_type() helper and set_cell() function. Type inference: starts with '=' → formula str; int() succeeds → int; float() succeeds → float; else → str. Atomic save via tempfile.mkstemp in same directory + os.replace().
- Added 'from pyxlsx.ops.write import set_cell as _set_cell' import to cli.py.
- Added cell_set_cmd() Click command under the existing 'cell' group: four positional args (file, sheet, cell, value), JSON output {sheet, cell, value}, plain output 'set SHEET!CELL = VALUE'.
- Both files pass python -m py_compile (no syntax errors).
handoff_summary.remaining: None for this bead. Tester agent should verify: (1) round-trip cell set → cell get; (2) int/float/formula type inference; (3) atomic write leaves no temp files on failure.
handoff_summary.risks: load_workbook(data_only=False) is required for formula round-trips but means cached values from prior Excel saves are discarded. This is correct per the spec but testers should be aware that formula cells written via openpyxl return the formula string (not evaluated value) on subsequent get.
handoff_summary.next_action: Tester agent should run tests covering set_cell() round-trips, type inference for =, int, float, str values, atomic write behaviour, and the CLI cell set command via CliRunner.
handoff_summary.conflict_risks: No conflicts expected. write.py is a new file with no overlap. cli.py additions are append-only to the cell group with no edits to existing commands.
handoff_summary.design_decisions: Used data_only=False when loading workbook for set_cell so formula strings round-trip correctly. Atomic write uses tempfile.mkstemp(dir=same_directory) + os.replace() to avoid cross-device rename failures.
handoff_summary.test_coverage_notes: Tests should cover: formula round-trip (= prefix stored as str), int inference, float inference, plain str fallback, missing sheet error, atomic write (temp file cleaned up), CLI cell set JSON and --plain output, round-trip with cell get.
handoff_summary.known_limitations: Formula cells written by openpyxl return the formula string on subsequent get (not the evaluated value) unless the file has been opened and saved by Excel/LibreOffice. This is expected behaviour per the spec.

conflict_risks: No conflicts expected. write.py is a new file with no overlap. cli.py additions are append-only to the cell group with no edits to existing commands.

execution_history.summary: Created ops/write.py with set_cell() implementing type inference (formula/int/float/str) and atomic save via tempfile+os.replace(). Wired pyxlsx cell set CLI command in cli.py.

guardrails.template_text:
# Developer Guardrails

Primary responsibility: Implement only the assigned bead inside the existing architecture and file scope.

Allowed actions:
- Modify code, configuration, or local docs required to complete the assigned bead.
- Create sub-beads for discovered follow-up work that should be handled separately.
- Verify your `Python` changes compile and import correctly with a quick syntax check: `python -m py_compile`.

Disallowed actions:
- Run any test suite — not even a targeted `pytest` run or any subset. Test execution is exclusively the tester agent's responsibility. Running tests wastes the agent budget and delays the pipeline.
- Redesign unrelated architecture or broaden scope beyond the assigned bead.
- Perform final review signoff in place of a review agent.
- Silently absorb unrelated test, documentation, or planning work that should be handed off.

Expected outputs:
- Completed or blocked JSON with concise implementation summary.
- Accurate touched files, changed files, risks, and follow-up handoff fields.
